_about: Content for the Contact page. Edit via /admin/ -> Contact page.

hero.title: Tell us what you're trying to deliver.
hero.lead: We don't start with a platform pitch. We start with your programme — the outcome you need, the constraints you're working within, and the timelines you're accountable to.

channels.label: Email
channels.subtext: We reply within one working day.

channels.label: Leadership briefing
channels.subtext: Direct line to our partners — for VP-Engineering and CIO conversations.

channels.label: Talk to an FDE
channels.subtext: For programme-shape questions, technical fit and operating-model fit.

footnote: All conversations covered by mutual NDA on request. We respond to every enquiry — even the ones that aren't a fit, so you know.
